title: Biome Tinted Chipped Mossy Blocks
description: Makes the mossy cobblestone and mossy stone brick blocks from Chipped use biome tint
body:
This resourcepack uses the Fusion model loader (Huge thanks to SuperMartijn642 for his help and debugging during the development of this project!) to overlay a biome-tinted texture on top of Chipped's mossy cobblestone and stone brick blocks. This pack does NOT add this feature to vanilla Mossy Cobblestone & Stone Bricks, you should instead refer to [Biome Moss](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-moss/gallery) by 4_Mac, which inspired me to add this effect to Chipped.

You may ship this resourcepack with modpacks, share with friends, etc. Feel free to find me in SuperMartijn's Discord found on the Fusion mod page for Q/A or suggestions.

_IMPORTANT_
Because Athena, Chipped's model loader ignores resourcepacks that dont adhere to its blockstate schema, you will have to remove the blockstates from within the Chipped Jar file under the assets directory for this resourcepack to work without using Chippeds original models.
